response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: No lyrics were provided in the reference JSON, requiring 100% manual transcription of Tokino Sora's song '決意のソラへ' and her spoken MC segments.
2. JSON Usage: N/A (Manual transcription utilized).
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed each vocal burst carefully, ensuring seamless grammatical flow in the English translation for split phrases (e.g., using ellipses for continuous lines). Spoken sections at 00:40 and 01:46 are accurately translated and synchronized.

subtitles.original: 夢を 夢で 終わらせたくないんだ
subtitles.english: I don't want to let my dream end as just a dream.

subtitles.original: まだ見ぬ景色を 見に行こうよ
subtitles.english: Let's go see the scenery we've yet to witness!

subtitles.original: もっと もっと
subtitles.english: More, more!

subtitles.original: 輝いて
subtitles.english: Shine brighter!

subtitles.original: 高く 高く
subtitles.english: Higher, higher!

subtitles.original: 飛び立とう
subtitles.english: Let's fly away!

subtitles.original: 奇跡さえも超えて
subtitles.english: Beyond even miracles!

subtitles.original: 皆さん たくさんのコメント ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for all of your comments, everyone!

subtitles.original: ひとつ ひとつ 重ねてきた
subtitles.english: One by one, we have built up...

subtitles.original: 未来地図のページをめくるように
subtitles.english: ...as if turning the pages of our map of the future.

subtitles.original: 泣いて 泣いて 泣いた夜も
subtitles.english: Even the nights I cried and cried...

subtitles.original: 大切な人生のストーリーだから
subtitles.english: ...are part of my precious life story.

subtitles.original: 夢を 夢で 終わらせたくないんだ
subtitles.english: I don't want to let my dream end as just a dream.

subtitles.original: まだ見ぬ景色を 見に行こうよ
subtitles.english: Let's go see the scenery we've yet to witness!

subtitles.original: 終わりのない歌を
subtitles.english: With an endless song...

subtitles.original: 君に 君に 君へと届け
subtitles.english: ...may it reach you, reach you, reach only you!

subtitles.original: ずっと ずっと 誓うの
subtitles.english: I will vow to you forever and ever...

subtitles.original: 決意のソラへ
subtitles.english: ...heading toward the sky of determination...

subtitles.original: 行こう！
subtitles.english: ...let's go!

subtitles.original: 本当にみんなのおかげで 最高の誕生日になりました！
subtitles.english: Thanks to all of you, this has been the best birthday ever!

subtitles.original: みんなのこと 大好きだよ！
subtitles.english: I love you all so much!

subtitles.original: アフターライブも来てね！
subtitles.english: Please come to the after-live, too!

subtitles.original: バイバイ！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye!
